runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.42) in a Grade 4, finishing a 9 length seventh. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from 12 starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (22.42) in a Grade 4, finishing a 9 length seventh. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from 12 starts. Has ability and looks a key chance.

runners.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 2.5 lengths third but did clock a slick 21.91 over the 380m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a 2.5 lengths third but did clock a slick 21.91 over the 380m trip. Can measure up with a repeat of that effort.

runners.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 3rd on March 11 over 407m at Rockhampton behind Farmor Leeway beaten 2 lengths (23.97) in a Grade 4/5. In form and another win would not surprise.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Strong performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 380m (22.41) beating Moneyball in Grade 5 on March 31. Looks the one to beat again.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 380m at this track. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.69) when fifth over 380m at this track in a Grade 3/4. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from 10 starts. Has ability and should be around the money.

runners.formComment: Should get a clear run from the wide draw. Wasn't impressive last start but does have a great record at this track and distance, can bounce back. One of the main chances.
